exportDimensions: Exported at 2880x2048 px (~2x). CSS reference frame ≈ 1440x1024 px. Divide all raw pixel measurements below by 2 for CSS px.
layoutSummary: Two-column app shell. Fixed left sidebar (~360px raw / 180px CSS wide, white) with logo, vertical nav, and a divider grouping. Right region is a light-gray scroll area (#F9FAFB-ish) containing: a top bar (page title "Pro Plan" left, help + notification icons + avatar right), a full-bleed purple "Coming Soon" gradient banner, then a centered content column (max ~1360px raw / 680px CSS, left/right gutter ~480px raw from sidebar edge). Content stacks three white rounded cards: (1) big referral hero card with two-column text+illustration, (2) referral-link card with input + Copy button, (3) a "MORE WAYS TO SHARE" labeled card with "Post to LinkedIn". Generous vertical spacing (~40-48px CSS) between cards.

sections.name: Left Sidebar
sections.description: Fixed vertical navigation on white. Top: PureVPN logo (rounded-square gradient purple mark with white play/triangle glyph) + 'purevpn' wordmark in dark slate. Below, a stack of nav items each = 24px icon + label. Items: Dashboard, Setup VPN, Downloads, Pro Plan, Earn Free Credits (ACTIVE), Security Tools, then a thin divider, then Account Settings, Subscription, Help Desk. Active item 'Earn Free Credits' sits in a light-lavender rounded pill spanning full sidebar width with purple icon + purple bold label.
sections.notes: Default labels are muted slate-gray with matching stroke icons; active row is the only filled pill. Row height ~66px raw / 33px CSS, icon-to-label gap ~16px raw. Divider is 1px hairline #EEECEC. Sidebar has a faint right border/shadow separating it from content.

sections.name: Top Bar
sections.description: Header row of the content region. Left: page title 'Pro Plan' in large bold dark slate. Right: a chat/help speech-bubble outline icon, a bell notification outline icon, and a circular avatar (empty light-lavender placeholder circle).
sections.layout: space-between: title left, icon cluster + avatar right
sections.notes: Icons are thin-stroke gray outline, ~24px CSS. Avatar ~44px raw / 22px CSS diameter. Sits above the banner with white/very-light background.

sections.name: Coming Soon Banner
sections.description: Full-width promotional strip below the top bar spanning the content region. Purple gradient fading to white on the right. Center-left white text: bold 'Coming Soon' then a vertical pipe separator, then 'Scan your company domain for leaked passwords, breached accounts & employee exposure.' followed by an emphasized/linked 'Join the waitlist'.
sections.notes: Left edge saturated violet, dissolves into the page background on the right so the right portion of text sits on near-white. Band height ~120px raw / 60px CSS. No border radius (full-bleed within content area). 'Join the waitlist' appears as a lighter/underlined-feel CTA.

sections.name: Referral Hero Card
sections.description: Large white rounded card. Two columns. LEFT: headline 'Share Intercom and earn $100' (the 'earn $100' portion in purple), a gray body paragraph explaining the referral (~4 lines), a sub-heading 'What they need to do:', a checklist of 3 items each with a filled purple circular checkmark ('Start a free trial via your referral link.', 'Purchase any paid Intercom plan.', 'Stay subscribed for 2 months.'), and an underlined link 'Referral terms and conditions.'. RIGHT: a 3D illustration of a large dark-purple smartphone showing colorful app tiles (bar chart, heart/health, play button, equalizer, gear), gold dollar coins floating, a seated person with a coral/red shirt using a laptop, and soft lavender leaf shapes behind.
keyColors: illustration: #2E0E3F/#401656 phone, #FE7062->#FF928E coral shirt, #FFC668/#FFB454/#FFE300 coins, #EAE4EF/#CFC1D8 leaves
sections.notes: Card corner radius ~24px raw / 12px CSS. Inner padding generous ~64px raw / 32px CSS. Checkmarks are solid-fill purple discs with white tick, ~24px CSS, ~16px gap to label. Very subtle card shadow. Extra vertical gap between paragraph and 'What they need to do:'.

sections.name: Referral Link Card
sections.description: White rounded card, single row. LEFT: label 'Your referral link' (bold) with helper text 'Use this link wherever you talk about Intercom.' below. RIGHT: a read-only text input showing 'https://my.purevpn.com/v2/dashboard/refer' followed by a solid purple 'Copy link' button.
sections.layout: space-between: label block left, input + button right
sections.notes: Input has 1px light-gray border, ~8px radius, light/white fill, gray placeholder-style URL text. Copy button solid violet, white bold label, ~8px radius. Card radius/padding matches hero card. Button and input vertically centered, small gap ~16px raw between them.

sections.name: More Ways To Share Card
sections.description: White rounded card. An eyebrow/overline label 'MORE WAYS TO SHARE' (uppercase, small, tracked, gray) sits just above the card. Inside: heading 'Post to LinkedIn', supporting text 'Recommend Intercom to your network. Your referral link is included automatically.', and a secondary outlined button 'Share on Linkedin' with the blue LinkedIn 'in' logo icon.
sections.notes: Overline is outside/above the card, letter-spaced uppercase ~11px CSS. 'Share on Linkedin' is a white pill button with thin gray border, dark label, and a small blue LinkedIn square icon on the left. Heading noticeably larger than link-card label — more of a section title weight.

typography.role: section-subhead (What they need to do: / Post to LinkedIn)

reusableComponents.name: SidebarNavItem
reusableComponents.description: Icon (24px stroke) + label row, full-width click target with rounded pill hover/active bg.
reusableComponents.variants: default (gray icon+label, transparent bg), active (purple icon+bold label, #ECE8FF pill bg), hover (light gray pill)

reusableComponents.name: Button
reusableComponents.variants: primary/solid-violet (Copy link, #7C2FF7 fill, white text), secondary/outline (Share on Linkedin, white fill + gray border + dark text + brand icon)

reusableComponents.name: TextInput
reusableComponents.description: Readonly/text field, 1px gray border, ~8px radius, light fill.

reusableComponents.name: Card
reusableComponents.description: White surface, ~12px CSS radius, subtle shadow, 32px inner padding.

reusableComponents.name: ChecklistItem
reusableComponents.description: Filled purple circular checkmark + text label.

reusableComponents.name: IconButton
reusableComponents.description: Bare stroke icon button in top bar.

reusableComponents.name: GradientBanner
reusableComponents.description: Full-bleed purple->white gradient promo strip with inline CTA link.

reusableComponents.name: OverlineLabel
reusableComponents.description: Uppercase tracked small gray section eyebrow.

charts: No real data charts. The only chart-like elements are decorative: a bar-chart glyph and an equalizer glyph rendered as flat icons inside the illustration's phone app tiles — not data-driven.

assetsNeeded.name: purevpn-logo-mark
assetsNeeded.note: Rounded-square gradient purple app icon with white play/triangle glyph

assetsNeeded.name: referral-hero-illustration
assetsNeeded.note: 3D scene: dark-purple smartphone with colorful app tiles, floating gold dollar coins, seated person in coral shirt on laptop, lavender leaf shapes. Single composited PNG/SVG

assetsNeeded.name: sidebar-icons
assetsNeeded.note: Dashboard (grid), Setup VPN (shield-gear), Downloads (down-tray), Pro Plan (star), Earn Free Credits (gift), Security Tools (shield-check), Account Settings (user-gear), Subscription (receipt/$), Help Desk (question-hex) — 24px stroke

assetsNeeded.name: check-circle-icon
assetsNeeded.note: Filled purple disc with white tick for checklist

assetsNeeded.name: linkedin-icon
assetsNeeded.note: LinkedIn blue rounded-square 'in' mark for Share button

assetsNeeded.name: copy-icon
assetsNeeded.note: Optional copy glyph if button gains one

fidelityNotes: Coming Soon banner is a horizontal gradient that starts saturated violet (#7C2FF7/#9151F8) and fully dissolves to white/transparent on the right (line 55: #7C2FF7 0% -> #9151F8 54.81% -> #FFFFFF 100%). Right-side text therefore sits on a near-white ground — keep white text but ensure the fade reaches page bg.
Copy link button: solid violet #7C2FF7; may alternatively be the subtle gradient #5B3DF5->#7358FF (line 51). No visible shadow, ~8px radius, bold white label.
Active sidebar pill uses very light lavender (#ECE8FF/#EAE4EF) — low-contrast, no border; only the active item is filled.
Cards: ~12px CSS radius, very soft/low-opacity drop shadow (barely visible on the light-gray page). Do not over-darken shadows.
Page background is a subtle cool off-white (#F9FAFB) that reads slightly darker than the white cards and white sidebar — the contrast between the three whites is delicate.
Checkmark discs are fully filled purple with a white tick, not outline.
Illustration has soft shadows/glows under coins and phone; coins use gold gradient (#FFE300/#FFC668/#FFB454). Person shirt uses coral gradient (#FE7062 -> #FF928E, lines 79-86).
Input border is a 1px hairline light gray (#DFDCDC/#EEECEC); fill is white/near-white, URL text muted gray.
Text link 'Referral terms and conditions.' is underlined dark slate, not purple.
Overline 'MORE WAYS TO SHARE' has noticeable letter-spacing and sits ABOVE the card, not inside it.
'Share on Linkedin' secondary button: white fill, 1px gray border, dark label, blue brand icon — pill/rounded ~8px.
interactions: Sidebar items: hover -> light pill bg; active route -> lavender pill + purple text (Earn Free Credits shown active).
Copy link button: click copies referral URL to clipboard, likely shows a 'Copied!' toast/label swap.
Referral link input: readonly, click-to-select-all typical.
'Join the waitlist' in banner: link/CTA to waitlist form.
'Referral terms and conditions.': link to terms.
'Share on Linkedin': opens LinkedIn share dialog with prefilled referral link.
Top bar bell/help icons: open notification panel / help/chat widget; avatar opens account menu.
Banner may be dismissible (no explicit close icon visible, but common).
responsiveNotes: Desktop (shown): persistent 180px sidebar + centered ~680px CSS content column with wide gutters. Tablet: sidebar can collapse to icon-rail or off-canvas hamburger; content column widens to fill with reduced gutters. Mobile: sidebar becomes an off-canvas drawer/hamburger; banner text wraps to 2-3 lines (keep gradient but allow height to grow); hero card collapses to single column with the illustration moving ABOVE or below the text (often hidden/simplified on small screens); referral-link card stacks vertically (label block, then full-width input, then full-width Copy button); 'Share on Linkedin' button goes full-width. Maintain card radius and padding but reduce inner padding to ~16-20px on mobile.
